channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Microsoft And Mayo Clinic Team Up To Build Frontier AI Model For Healthcare

media:content.media:description: Healthcare has long been viewed as one of the most promising and challenging applications for AI

item.description: Unlike general-purpose chatbots, the new model is being designed specifically for clinical reasoning, diagnosis support and healthcare decision-making.
item.content:encoded: Unlike general-purpose chatbots, the new model is being designed specifically for clinical reasoning, diagnosis support and healthcare decision-making.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The China Shock 2.0 May Already Be Here
item.description: According to the IMF, China's total non-financial sector debt has climbed to roughly 313% of GDP and is projected to reach 323% by 2026.
item.content:encoded: According to the IMF, China's total non-financial sector debt has climbed to roughly 313% of GDP and is projected to reach 323% by 2026.

item.title: Abu Dhabi Freezes Rent Hikes Amid Iran War, Big Relief for Indian Expats

media:content.media:description: Under the new rules, all tenancy contract renewals will be processed with a 0 per cent rent increase.

item.description: ADREC has clarified that the rental amount stated in the previous tenancy contract will remain valid for both renewed and newly signed agreements.
item.content:encoded: ADREC has clarified that the rental amount stated in the previous tenancy contract will remain valid for both renewed and newly signed agreements.

item.title: 'Just For Clicks': Indian Americans Dismiss Frisco's Anti-India Propaganda

media:content.media:description: Neha said claims that Indians are taking over the city are unfounded.

item.description: The 22-year-olds, Neha Suratani and Sahaas Kaul, have dismissed invasion claims, saying they are not based on facts and that anti-Indians are doing it for social media.
item.content:encoded: The 22-year-olds, Neha Suratani and Sahaas Kaul, have dismissed invasion claims, saying they are not based on facts and that anti-Indians are doing it for social media.

item.title: Elon Musk Set 602 Business Goals In 15 Years. He Met Only 19% Of Them On Time

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk's success rate dropped over time.

item.description: Many of Musk’s most ambitious plans were delayed, remained unfinished or could not be verified
item.content:encoded: Many of Musk’s most ambitious plans were delayed, remained unfinished or could not be verified

item.title: Khamenei Adviser Vows 'Deluge Of Missiles' If New US Attack On Iran

media:content.media:description: The military adviser said the aggressor will swiftly be punished

item.description: The warning followed US strikes on an Iranian tanker and on Iran's Qeshm island, sparking retaliatory attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain.
item.content:encoded: The warning followed US strikes on an Iranian tanker and on Iran's Qeshm island, sparking retaliatory attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain.

item.title: Turkish Airlines Flight Flooded With Sewage, Faeces Mid-Takeoff From Denver

media:content.media:description: Sewage water floods Turkish Airlines cabin, forcing flight cancellation at Denver.

item.description: Turkish Airlines flight from Denver was cancelled due to the lavatory flooding the cabin with sewage water and faeces.
item.content:encoded: Turkish Airlines flight from Denver was cancelled due to the lavatory flooding the cabin with sewage water and faeces.

item.title: How Hollywood Legend Martin Scorsese Became An Unlikely AI Ally

media:content.media:description: Martin Scorsese has directed iconic films like Taxi Driver and The Departed

item.description: Hollywood and the creative arts have majorly pushed back on AI and that's why Scorsese partnering with an AI firm may come as a surprise to many.
item.content:encoded: Hollywood and the creative arts have majorly pushed back on AI and that's why Scorsese partnering with an AI firm may come as a surprise to many.

item.title: Explained: How Iran Is Using Billboards As Wartime Propaganda

media:content.media:description: This bilingual billboard is targeted to Western and specifically American audiences.

item.description: Researchers argue these billboards are part of a broader visual communication strategy on the part of the state. They are intended to be photographed, posted and shared widely on social media as a way of projecting power and resistance to a global au
item.content:encoded: Researchers argue these billboards are part of a broader visual communication strategy on the part of the state. They are intended to be photographed, posted and shared widely on social media as a way of projecting power and resistance to a global au

item.title: US-Iran Live Updates: Iran Strikes Kuwait Airport, Several Injured, Fights Suspended

media:content.media:description: US-Iran War Live: The US said that it had "successfully defeated" a series of Iranian missile attacks.

item.description: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: US Wants To End Russian Oil Sanctions Waiver Amid Iran War: Its Impact On India

media:content.media:description: New Delhi sought an extension of waivers from the United States amid surging crude prices.

item.description: Data from energy intelligence firm Kpler shows India imported a record-shattering 2.3 million barrels per day of Russian crude last month, supported by the continued import of cargoes under the sanctions waiver.
item.content:encoded: Data from energy intelligence firm Kpler shows India imported a record-shattering 2.3 million barrels per day of Russian crude last month, supported by the continued import of cargoes under the sanctions waiver.

item.title: US Trade Team In Delhi, Trump Plans New Tariffs On India Over "Forced Labour"

media:content.media:description: But the proposed tariffs come with various exemptions such as beef, coffee and certain fruits and nuts.

item.description: "Failed To Act On Forced Labour": US Plans New Tariffs On India, 59 Countries
item.content:encoded: "Failed To Act On Forced Labour": US Plans New Tariffs On India, 59 Countries

item.title: US Man Destroys Home With Excavator After Wife Threatens Divorce

media:content.media:description: US man charged after destroying house with excavator during family dispute (Representative Pic).

item.description: Erik Pierwsza, a Pennsylvania resident, faces multiple charges after attempting to tear down his home with family inside.
item.content:encoded: Erik Pierwsza, a Pennsylvania resident, faces multiple charges after attempting to tear down his home with family inside.

item.title: Elon Musk Could Become World's First Trillionaire With SpaceX's Market Debut

media:content.media:description: Forbes magazine on Tuesday estimated Musk's net worth at nearly $835 billion.

item.description: The valuation of the SpaceX, founded in 2002, is expected to range from $1.7 trillion to $2 trillion, up from a range that topped out at $1.5 trillion in March.
item.content:encoded: The valuation of the SpaceX, founded in 2002, is expected to range from $1.7 trillion to $2 trillion, up from a range that topped out at $1.5 trillion in March.

item.title: Trump Orders AI Developers To Share Models With Government Before Release

media:content.media:description: Trump scrapped an AI oversight order from Joe Biden on his first day back in the White House.

item.description: US President Donald Trump on Tuesday signed an executive order creating a voluntary framework under which AI developers will share advanced models with...
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Tuesday signed an executive order creating a voluntary framework under which AI developers will share advanced models with...

item.title: "I Can't Breathe": Video Shows UK Cops Arresting Dying Teen Stabbed By Indian

media:content.media:description: The clip also shows officers dismissing Nowak when he said that he had been stabbed.

item.description: The footage has been released by the police, with the permission of Nowak's family, after his attacker, Vickrum Digwa, 23, was sentenced to life with a minimum of 21 years in prison in the UK earlier this week.
item.content:encoded: The footage has been released by the police, with the permission of Nowak's family, after his attacker, Vickrum Digwa, 23, was sentenced to life with a minimum of 21 years in prison in the UK earlier this week.

item.title: US Strikes Iran's Qeshm Islands As Tehran Fires Missiles At Kuwait, Bahrain

media:content.media:description: The US said that it conducted self-defense strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island.

item.description: US Strikes Iran's Qeshm Islands As Tehran Fires Missiles At Kuwait, Bahrain
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1107895/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US Strikes Iran's Qeshm Islands As Tehran Fires Missiles At Kuwait, Bahrain

item.title: Trump-Netanyahu Relationship Under Growing Strain Amid Iran War

media:content.media:description: Trump faces growing criticism from parts of his MAGA due to the Iran war.

item.description: Trump wants a way out of a war that has badly hit the US economy less than six months before midterm elections, which will decide if his Republican party keeps control of Congress.
item.content:encoded: Trump wants a way out of a war that has badly hit the US economy less than six months before midterm elections, which will decide if his Republican party keeps control of Congress.

item.title: Kuwait Intercepts Missile And Drone Attacks As Middle East Tensions Rise

media:content.media:description: Bahrain's interior ministry also said a warning siren had been sounded.

item.description: Kuwaiti air defences were intercepting hostile missile and drone attacks on Wednesday, state news agency KUNA reported, quoting the country's army which did not say where the threats came from.
item.content:encoded: Kuwaiti air defences were intercepting hostile missile and drone attacks on Wednesday, state news agency KUNA reported, quoting the country's army which did not say where the threats came from.

item.title: Iran Stops Talking To Mediators, Reports Say, But Trump Says Talks Continue

media:content.media:description: Trump called reports of a cessation in talks "false and erroneous."

item.description: Iran stopped communicating with mediators about extending a ceasefire in the war with the US and Israel, two semiofficial Iranian news agencies reported Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: Iran stopped communicating with mediators about extending a ceasefire in the war with the US and Israel, two semiofficial Iranian news agencies reported Tuesday.
